positive: A vibrant, stylized forest creature silhouette, resembling a fusion of a fox, a deer, and a mythical jungle cat, standing in a gentle, watchful pose. The background features stylized, swirling tropical foliage and abstract, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. Composition must be centered and strong, emphasizing the creature's elegant profile and dramatic pose. Use a color palette dominated by emerald greens, sapphire blues, burnt orange, and deep violets. The art style should be highly detailed vector illustration combined with neo-tribal stained glass aesthetics, achieving strong contrast and clean, defined outlines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic, volumetric lighting highlighting the contours of the creature. Crisp lines, flat color blocks, minimal gradient usage.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, dirty, grayscale, monochrome
